description: Use this API to change the value of a CON of a designated induction machine model at a specified machine. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = change_immod_con(ibus, id, name, j, rdata)
python_syntax: ierr = change_immod_con(ibus, id, name, j, rdata)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Induction machine bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Induction machine identifier. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Con number to change relative to the start of the block of cons assigned to this model (1 for con(j), 2 for con(j+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: rdata
parameters.description: New con value. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: No model at this induction machine.
model at this machine is aaa not NAME.
no input ICONs used in model NAME.
ICON number outside of the ICON range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
